---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

The actual user-facing pain — not the proposed solution. E.g., "I want to log every training run to Weights & Biases without writing a callback by hand."

## Proposed solution

Sketch the API or behavior you have in mind. Examples welcome.

## Alternatives considered

What else could solve this? Any out-of-tree workarounds you're using today?

## Additional context

Constraints (back-compat with existing runs? device-specific?), related issues, etc.
